variants._comment:: ($self$) 被拒绝求婚 口上文
($self$) 婚姻关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_1: $self$的手指不安地绞着衣角，视线游移不定。"那个……虽然不知道现在说合不合适，但我想一直留在$target$身边。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_2: $self$从口袋里掏出一个略显陈旧的小盒子，动作有些僵硬。"这对我来说很重要……希望你能收下。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_3: $self$深吸了一口气，声音比平时低了很多。"我们……要不要试着成为家人？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_4: $self$把一份填好的申请表递到桌上，眼神却盯着别处。"手续我都查过了，如果你不反感的话……"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_5: $self$突然单膝跪地，脸上带着灿烂到有些刺眼的笑容。"抓住你了！以后你就是我的人了，$target$！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_6: $self$直接抓起$target$的手，将戒指强行套了上去。"尺寸完美！不允许退货哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_7: $self$紧紧抱住$target$的脖子，在耳边大声宣告。"我决定了！我要做你的新娘！现在！立刻！马上！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_propose_8: $self$从身后拿出一大捧花，笑嘻嘻地凑近。"怎么样？要是答应的话，附赠一个超级可爱的老婆哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_1: $self$似乎还没反应过来，呆呆地眨了眨眼，随即眼眶瞬间红了。"真、真的吗？没有在骗我？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_2: $self$捂住嘴巴，肩膀微微颤抖着，发出了压抑的呜咽声。"太好了……我以为……太好了……"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_3: $self$什么也没说，只是默默地把额头抵在$target$的肩膀上，抓着衣服的手指用力到发白。
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_4: $self$兴奋地尖叫一声，直接扑到了$target$身上，两人一起摔在地毯上。"我就知道！你也离不开我对不对！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_5: $self$捧着$target$的脸用力亲了一口，笑得合不拢嘴。"这是你这辈子做过最正确的决定！我保证！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_set_6: $self$原地转了个圈，向着周围并不存在的观众挥手致意。"听到了吗！$target$答应了！他是我的了！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_1: $self$像是被烫到一样缩回了手，眼神里充满了慌乱。"对不起……我现在还没办法回应这种期待。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_2: $self$苦笑着摇了摇头，轻轻推回了那个盒子。"你值得更好的，$target$。而不是像我这样的人。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_3: $self$避开了视线，声音干涩。"太快了……再给我一点时间，好吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_4: $self$看着那个戒指，就像看着什么无关紧要的垃圾，发出一声轻嗤。"你是不是误会了什么？我们只是玩玩而已。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_5: $self$双手抱胸，冷冷地打断了$target$的话。"收回去吧。这种束缚对我来说没有任何意义。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refuse_6: $self$叹了口气，眼神变得毫无温度。"别做傻事了，$target$。我们之间永远不可能有那种未来。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_1: $self$手中的盒子掉落在地上，发出一声清脆的声响。她像是失去了所有力气。"啊……是这样啊。抱歉，是我自作多情了。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_2: $self$勉强挤出一个比哭还难看的笑容。"没关系！没关系的……我早就猜到了……"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_3: $self$低着头，以此掩饰眼角的湿润。"忘了吧。就当我今天……什么都没说过。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_4: $self$难以置信地瞪大了眼睛，声音尖锐起来。"为什么？明明我们相处得这么好！还有谁能比我更适合你？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_5: $self$一把将手中的花束摔向墙角。"开什么玩笑！你在耍我吗，$target$？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_refused_6: $self$死死盯着$target$，眼中的爱意瞬间转化为了某种执念。"你逃不掉的。哪怕你不愿意，我也不会放手。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_1: $self$看着窗外，声音平静得像是在谈论天气。"这种日子，我一天也过不下去了。签字吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_2: $self$将最后一件行李放入箱子，连头也没回。"钥匙放在玄关了。以后别再联系我。"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_3: $self$看着曾经的合照，面无表情地将其扣在桌上。"我们之间已经什么都不剩了。除了互相折磨，还有什么意义？"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_4: $self$红着眼睛，将手中的杯子狠狠砸向地面，碎片飞溅。"滚！带着你的东西全部滚出去！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_5: $self$跪坐在地上，双手掩面痛哭，声音嘶哑。"为什么会变成这样……把我的青春还给我啊！"
zh-cn.relationship_marriage_break_6: $self$抓着$target$的衣领，一边摇晃一边大喊。"是你毁了一切！是你把这个家毁了！我恨你！"

en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_1: $self$'s fingers nervously fidget with the hem of her clothes, her gaze shifting uncertainly. "Um... I don't know if this is the right time, but I want to stay by your side forever, $target$."
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_2: $self$ pulls a slightly worn small box from her pocket, her movements stiff. "This is important to me... I hope you'll accept it."
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_3: $self$ takes a deep breath, her voice much quieter than usual. "Shall we... try to become a family?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_4: $self$ slides a completed application form across the table, avoiding eye contact. "I've checked all the procedures. If you're not opposed to it..."
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_5: $self$ suddenly drops to one knee, a dazzling smile on her face. "Gotcha! You're mine now, $target$!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_6: $self$ grabs $target$'s hand and forcibly slips the ring onto it. "Perfect fit! No returns allowed!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_7: $self$ hugs $target$'s neck tightly, declaring loudly into your ear. "I've decided! I'm going to be your bride! Now! Right now! Immediately!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_propose_8: $self$ reveals a huge bouquet of flowers from behind her back, leaning in with a grin. "So? If you say yes, you get a super cute wife as a bonus!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_1: $self$ seems stunned, blinking blankly before her eyes suddenly turn red. "R-really? You're not lying to me?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_2: $self$ covers her mouth, shoulders trembling slightly as she lets out a suppressed sob. "Thank goodness... I thought... Thank goodness..."
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_3: $self$ says nothing, simply resting her forehead against $target$'s shoulder, her fingers gripping your clothes until her knuckles turn white.
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_4: $self$ lets out an excited scream and tackles $target$, sending both of you tumbling onto the carpet. "I knew it! You can't live without me either, right?!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_5: $self$ cups $target$'s face and plants a firm kiss on it, grinning from ear to ear. "This is the best decision you've ever made in your life! I promise!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_set_6: $self$ spins around in a circle, waving to an imaginary audience. "Did you hear that?! $target$ said yes! He's mine!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_1: $self$ pulls her hand back as if burned, panic filling her eyes. "I'm sorry... I can't respond to those kinds of expectations right now."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_2: $self$ smiles bitterly and shakes her head, gently pushing the box back. "You deserve better, $target$. Not someone like me."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_3: $self$ looks away, her voice dry. "It's too soon... Just give me a little more time, okay?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_4: $self$ looks at the ring as if it were trash, letting out a scoff. "Did you misunderstand something? We're just having fun."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_5: $self$ crosses her arms, coldly cutting off $target$. "Take it back. That kind of commitment means nothing to me."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refuse_6: $self$ sighs, her gaze turning cold. "Don't be stupid, $target$. There's no future like that for us."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_1: The box drops from $self$'s hand, hitting the floor with a crisp sound. She looks drained of all strength. "Ah... I see. Sorry, I got ahead of myself."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_2: $self$ forces a smile that looks worse than crying. "It's okay! It's totally okay... I kind of guessed it anyway..."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_3: $self$ lowers her head to hide the moisture in her eyes. "Forget it. Just pretend I... never said anything today."
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_4: $self$'s eyes widen in disbelief, her voice turning shrill. "Why? We get along so well! Who could possibly be better for you than me?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_5: $self$ throws the bouquet violently into the corner. "Are you kidding me?! Are you playing with me, $target$?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_refused_6: $self$ stares intently at $target$, the love in her eyes instantly twisting into obsession. "You can't escape. Even if you don't want to, I won't let go."
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_1: $self$ stares out the window, her voice as calm as if discussing the weather. "I can't go on like this for another day. Just sign the papers."
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_2: $self$ packs the last item into her suitcase without looking back. "The key is in the entryway. Don't contact me again."
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_3: $self$ looks at an old photo of you two, then places it face down on the table, expressionless. "There's nothing left between us. What's the point, other than torturing each other?"
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_4: $self$ with red eyes, smashes the cup in her hand onto the floor, shards flying everywhere. "Get out! Take your stuff and get the hell out!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_5: $self$ sits on the floor, burying her face in her hands and sobbing, her voice hoarse. "Why did it turn out like this... Give me back my youth!"
en-us.relationship_marriage_break_6: $self$ grabs $target$ by the collar, shaking you while screaming. "You ruined everything! You destroyed this family! I hate you!"
